AU_TRANSACTION.au_flowDescriptor: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <AdeptiaPE xmlns="jelly:com.werken.blissed.jelly.BlissedTagLibrary" xmlns:version="4.7" xmlns:j="jelly:core" xmlns:abpm="jelly:com.adeptia.indigo.jelly.IndigoTagLibrary" xmlns:pd="jelly:com.adeptia.indigo.pd.ProcessDesignerTagLibrary"> <process name="mainProcess" start="startState" var="mainProcess"> <state name="startState"> <activity> <abpm:installGlobalExceptionHandlers/> </activity> </state> <state name="Task_1wbm7sf"> <activity> <abpm:activity name="Test" async="false" id="1417381311435145216" signal="SignalComplete" type="CustomPlugin"> <abpm:params> <abpm:param name="restartTriesCount">[ABPM_._ESCAPE_._CDATA_._START]0[ABPM_._ESCAPE_._CDATA_._END]</abpm:param> <abpm:param name="restartWaitTime">[ABPM_._ESCAPE_._CDATA_._START]60[ABPM_._ESCAPE_._CDATA_._END]</abpm:param> <abpm:param name="streamNames">[ABPM_._ESCAPE_._CDATA_._START]null[ABPM_._ESCAPE_._CDATA_._END]</abpm:param> <abpm:param name="targetConnectTimeout">[ABPM_._ESCAPE_._CDATA_._START]300[ABPM_._ESCAPE_._CDATA_._END]</abpm:param> <abpm:param name="characterSetEncoding">[ABPM_._ESCAPE_._CDATA_._START]UTF-8[ABPM_._ESCAPE_._CDATA_._END]</abpm:param> <abpm:param name="generateStream">[ABPM_._ESCAPE_._CDATA_._START]false[ABPM_._ESCAPE_._CDATA_._END]</abpm:param> <abpm:param name="Consume Stream">[ABPM_._ESCAPE_._CDATA_._START]false[ABPM_._ESCAPE_._CDATA_._END]</abpm:param> </abpm:params> </abpm:activity> </activity> </state> <state name="StartEvent_1"> <activity> <pd:event type="start" subType="none"/> </activity> </state> <state name="EndEvent_0zumz68"> <activity> <pd:event type="end" subType="none"/> </activity> </state> <transition from="startState" to="StartEvent_1"/> <transition from="StartEvent_1" to="Task_1wbm7sf"/> <transition from="Task_1wbm7sf" to="EndEvent_0zumz68"/> </process> </AdeptiaPE>
